creator: Anastasia D’Amario | High Protein Recipes
source_text:
I almost didn’t make this recipe… but now it’s changed my life! 🙌🏼 

This moist, fluffy, not-too-sweet Biscoff Banana Loaf is exactly what we all need right now, okay? 

It’s made in one bowl, ready in 40 minutes, and each slice packs 7 grams of protein and 4 grams of fiber. Also, it’s way lower in sugar while still tasting like something you’d get at a bakery… 

Wins all around! 🤎

Comment “love banana bread” and I’ll send you the recipe card‼️ 

Who will you be sharing a slice with? I know I can’t wait to feed my man again! (Because dessert always tastes better when someone else steals half 🤣) 

•

#healthyrecipes #highproteinlowcarb #easyrecipes #healthydessert #bananabread
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The demonstrative sentence explicitly names the title-cased dish, but the ingredients and method are withheld behind a comment-to-DM call to action.
Accepted after generalized title-cased noun-phrase extraction from a demonstrative subject; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
